middleware.description: Resolves the active locale from the 7-step precedence chain (query, X-Locale header, user preference, tenant default, Accept-Language, subdomain, app default). Calls App::setLocale($code) + stores on RequestContext. Fires LocaleResolved event.

When the resolved locale differs from user.profile.preferred_locale AND the caller submitted an explicit ?locale=xx or X-Locale header, persist the choice to the user profile. Off for stateless API tokens (auth:sanctum with no user).
Refuses the request unless the resolved locale is in the tenant's enabled locales list. Used on translation-management endpoints so users can't manage locales they haven't enabled.
